package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationAppendWithoutKnownCapacity() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_memory_allocation_append_without_known_capacity"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Memory allocation. Flag slice appends in builders where an obvious count is available for make capacity."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
